# Allan Medeiros

I work on insurance platform software at Allianz Technology (Java, Spring Boot, Kubernetes).
Previously IBM for 15 years (IT Architect 2016–2021). Porto, Portugal.

## Work
- Allianz Technology (2021–): insurance platform; Spring Boot on Kubernetes; AWS migrations (~25% lower run cost, ~40% less downtime on migrated paths).
- IBM (2006–2021): Java systems and integrations; IT Architect last five years.
- Tools: Java, Spring Boot, Kubernetes, Azure/AKS, GCP, AWS, Jenkins, Docker.
